title: SocketHerdr adapter + web screen/input endpoints (remove WS relay)
action: SocketHerdr impl of Herdr trait over the socket (session.snapshot, ping w/ protocol pin, pane.read visible/ansi, pane.send_input text then Enter key for submit). Web: delete/park relay.rs WS; add screen.rs with GET /api/agents/:pane/screen (auth->read_pane) and POST /api/agents/:pane/input (auth->send_input {text}). Update AppState to hold Arc<dyn Herdr>. Keep /api/agents,/api/health,auth. Remove ws route.
verify: cargo test --quiet web && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings

trace.outcome: SocketHerdr impl over herdr.sock (session.snapshot, ping+protocol pin, pane.read visible/ansi, pane.send_input text+Enter). Web: removed WS relay; GET /api/panes/:pane/screen + POST /api/panes/:pane/input (auth, opaque-404). AppState holds Arc<dyn Herdr>. Committed 334ea15.
trace.verification_evidence: web tests: screen requires auth (opaque 404), screen returns pane text, reply posts+lands, reply-unknown 404, agents flat, health. LIVE: /api/health proto16, /api/agents 7 real agents, /api/panes/:pane/screen real 67-line ANSI screen.
trace.verify_output: rust unit+e2e green, clippy+fmt clean, web 15 tests+bundle; live-verified vs real herdr (7 agents, real screen, proto 16)
trace.verify_command: cargo test && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings && cd web && npm run bundle && npm test -- --run
